title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Omkar Realtors

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Omkar Realtors
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Omkar Realtors. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Ghaziabad-based team.

About Omkar Realtors:
Omkar Realtors is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omkar Realtors!
